'''bangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eastbound|eastbound]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eastbound|eastbound]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bangate|bangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bangatesher|bangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bangatesherĂ«m|bangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bangatero|bangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bangateshĂ«|bangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bangateshĂ«m|bangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibangatero|gokibangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibangateshĂ«|gokibangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibangateshĂ«m|gokibangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobangankerom|gobangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobangankeshĂ«|gobangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobangankeshĂ«m|gobangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobangankeya|gobangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bangaterom|bangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bangatemu|bangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bangateya|bangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibangaterom|gokibangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibangatemu|gokibangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibangateya|gokibangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bangangate|bangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bangangatesher|bangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bangangatesherĂ«m|bangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bangangatero|bangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bangangateshĂ«|bangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bangangateshĂ«m|bangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibangangatero|gokibangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibangangateshĂ«|gokibangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibangangateshĂ«m|gokibangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobangangankerom|gobangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobangangankeshĂ«|gobangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobangangankeshĂ«m|gobangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobangangankeya|gobangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bangangaterom|bangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bangangatemu|bangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bangangateya|bangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibangangaterom|gokibangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibangangatemu|gokibangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibangangateya|gokibangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠte|bĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠtesher|bĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠtero|bĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠngĂŠtero|gokibĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠterom|bĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠtemu|bĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠngĂŠteya|bĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠngĂŠterom|gokibĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠngĂŠteya|gokibĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafngafte|bafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafngaftesher|bafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafngaftesherĂ«m|bafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafngaftero|bafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafngafteshĂ«|bafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafngafteshĂ«m|bafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafngaftero|gokibafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafngafteshĂ«|gokibafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafngafteshĂ«m|gokibafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafngafnkerom|gobafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafngafnkeshĂ«|gobafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafngafnkeshĂ«m|gobafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafngafnkeya|gobafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafngafterom|bafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafngaftemu|bafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafngafteya|bafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafngafterom|gokibafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafngaftemu|gokibafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafngafteya|gokibafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
